sn1.6:1.0.1: At Sāvatthī. Standing to one side, that devata recited this verse in the presence of the Blessed One:
sn1.6:1.0.2: v.9"How many are asleep whenothersare awake?How many are awake whenotherssleep?By how many does one gather dust?By how many is one purified?"
sn1.6:1.0.3: v.10"Five are asleep whenothersare awake;Five are awake whenotherssleep.By five things one gathers dust,By five things one is purified."sn.i.4
